sim_desc: Adjust parameters to verify the dynamic downgrade decision tree in real-time.
diag_initial_desc: Click the button above to run health diagnostics on local secure zone and network pipeline.
offline_local_placeholder: Generated local SDP will appear here...
alert_license_success: Lifetime license verified! Key securely saved in local vault.
alert_license_fail: License failed: Invalid key or hardware profile mismatch.
alert_sdp_success: Local SDP Offer generated and copied to clipboard.
alert_sdp_empty: Please paste the remote SDP first.
help_remote_id: Enter the 9-digit Device ID of the target machine. This serves as a unique address for P2P connection.
help_totp: Input the 6-digit dynamic passcode generated from the host. Rotates every 30 seconds for secure validation.
help_offline_sdp: Establishes connection without a signaling server by copying and swapping raw SDP configuration text.
help_license: Enter your lifetime validation key. Once verified, unlimited P2P connections are permanently unlocked.
help_privacy: Disables host physical monitor outputs and streams to a virtual display driver to prevent local eavesdropping.
help_sim: Testing suite. Adjust latency (RTT) or loss rate to observe how the network quality decision tree adapts.
help_sim_rtt: Simulates Round-Trip Time. High latency triggers target framerate reduction to maintain responsiveness.
help_sim_loss: Simulates packet loss rate. Higher loss triggers color downgrade (YUV 4:2:0) and bitrate restriction.
suggest_no_network: Please check your internet connection or try another DNS server.
suggest_no_license: No valid lifetime license detected. Please enter and verify your license key below to unlock full P2P direct connections.
suggest_optimal: Excellent network status. Unlocking 144fps P2P direct connection channel.
alert_sdp_applied:
Remote SDP applied successfully! WebRTC ICE negotiating...
Decentralized secure Handshake completed! AES-256-GCM data channel established.
err_invalid_signature: The activation ticket signature signed by server is invalid and blocked by the local security module.
err_no_ticket: The server did not return an activation ticket.
err_connect_server: Failed to connect to the verification server:
err_limit_exceeded: Activation failed: This key has reached the limit of 5 devices. Currently bound: {0}
err_cooldown_active: Anti-fraud block: Deactivation is too frequent, please wait {0} seconds.
err_device_not_bound: Deactivation failed: This device is not bound to this key.
err_license_empty: License key and HWID cannot be empty.
help_sim_relay: Force WebRTC connection into Relay (TURN) mode to observe auto-downgrade behavior under restricted bandwidth.
smart_auto_active_desc: System is auto-detecting. Network and quality are in optimal states.
help_smart_auto: When enabled, the system automatically evaluates real-time latency and packet loss to apply the best framerate and quality configurations. No manual tuning required.
toast_system_error: ⚠️ System Error: Open Advanced Panel to view logs
drop_zone: Drag & Drop files here or Click to upload
help_inst_1: Trackpad Mode: Use one finger to move cursor. Tap to left-click, double-tap to drag.
help_inst_2: Two-Finger: Swipe with two fingers to scroll. Tap with two fingers for right-click.
help_inst_3: Keyboard: Tap the ⌨️ icon in the bottom right corner when connected.
help_priv_desc: Your privacy is our priority. 2syn utilizes peer-to-peer WebRTC technology with end-to-end encryption. Your screen data and inputs are transmitted directly between your devices and are never stored or inspected by our servers. We do not collect or sell your personal data.
err_rtc_failed: P2P connection failed. The local and remote devices might be behind a strict symmetric NAT or firewall and cannot punch through. Please click "🚀 Enable Relay Mode" to establish connection.
err_target_offline: The remote device is offline. Please make sure the device ID is correct.
err_rejected: Connection rejected: PIN verification failed or remote host denied access.
err_signaling_offline: Failed to connect to the signaling server. Please check your internet connection.
err_invalid_remote_id: Please enter a valid 9-digit Device ID.
err_invalid_pin: Please enter the target access PIN.
pointer_lock_tooltip: Pointer locked. Press ESC to exit.
txt_tailscale_alert: Due to restricted network conditions (no public IP or strict NAT), it is highly recommended to install Tailscale on both machines. Under Tailscale, you can establish direct high-speed P2P connections bypass most firewalls! Once installed, this light will automatically turn green.
desc_tailscale_detected: Tailscale interface detected. You now have 100% traversal rate through cellular and CGNAT networks for ultra-stable, high-speed connections.
desc_ipv6_detected: IPv6 network detected, allowing successful direct P2P connection in most cases. However, strict IPv4-only mobile connections may fall back to relay. Tailscale is recommended for the best experience.
desc_nat_warning: Your network lacks IPv6 and is behind multiple NAT layers. The probability of building a direct P2P connection is very low, which may lead to high latency. We highly recommend installing Tailscale.
alert_answer_generated: Answer SDP has been generated and copied to your clipboard. Please send it to the remote party.
alert_web_diag_unsupported: Connectivity diagnostics are not supported in Web Client mode.
desc_web_client_info: Web Client controller. The connection pipeline will be automatically evaluated. If P2P fails due to symmetric NAT or strict firewalls, please click "🚀 Enable Relay Mode".
err_macos_permissions_missing: ⚠️ macOS permissions (Screen Recording / Accessibility) are missing!
perm_modal_desc: Due to macOS security policies, 2syn requires "Screen Recording" and "Accessibility" permissions to stream screens and inject input events. Please follow these steps:
perm_modal_step_5: Once completed, please restart 2syn application to apply changes.
video_error_title: ⚠️ Connection Established but No Video Stream (Black Screen)
video_error_desc: If the remote host is macOS, ensure "Screen Recording" and "Accessibility" permissions are granted in System Settings. If blocked by browser autoplay policies, click Force Play below.
